plugins.name: learning-sprint
plugins.description: Takes any topic from zero to retained understanding via chained techniques: 20-hour plan, cheat sheet, progressive quiz, difficulty ladder, validated resources, the Feynman re-teach loop, and spaced-repetition export (Anki deck, study guide, practice exam). Grounds all material in fresh multi-source web research before presenting — never teaches from memory. Progress persists and resumes across sessions. Strong fit for certification study.
